result:
The fix is complete. Here's a summary:

## Root Cause

The `parseSourcesToFileScheme` function in `TemplateManager.kt:342` used `Jsoup.parse(content)` to parse card HTML. When Jsoup parses a full HTML document, it follows HTML spec rules and moves `<script>` elements into the `<head>` section of the DOM tree. When the function then calls `doc.body().html()` to get the output, the `<script>` tags (now in `<head>`) are excluded from the result.

This only manifested when a substitution was made (when `hasMadeChanges` is true), because when no changes are needed, the original `content` string is returned unchanged.

## Fix

**File changed**: `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/libanki/TemplateManager.kt` (line 343)

**Change**: `Jsoup.parse(content)` -> `Jsoup.parseBodyFragment(content)`

`Jsoup.parseBodyFragment()` treats the entire input as body content rather than a full HTML document. This means `<script>` tags remain in the `<body>` element and are properly included when `doc.body().html()` serializes the output. This is the same API already used in `TtsParser.kt` and `ImageField.kt` in the same codebase for similar fragment-parsing needs.
